name: Reverse Chocolate Chip Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Cream butter, sugar, and salt together until light and fluffy.
3. Beat in vanilla and eggs.
4. Gradually beat in flour and baking soda.
5. Mix in chocolate and nuts.
6. Drop by teaspoonfuls onto a greased cookie sheet.
7. Bake for 15 minutes.
